creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
sorry for the delay.

The bzip file seems corrupted:

bigblue1> bunzip2 paraview.diff.bz2

bunzip2: Data integrity error when decompressing.
        Input file = paraview.diff.bz2, output file = paraview.diff

It is possible that the compressed file(s) have become corrupted.
You can use the -tvv option to test integrity of such files.

You can use the `bzip2recover' program to attempt to recover
data from undamaged sections of corrupted files.

bunzip2: Deleting output file paraview.diff, if it exists.
bigblue1> 

bigblue1> bunzip2 -tvv paraview.diff.bz2
  paraview.diff.bz2: 
    [1: huff+mtf data integrity (CRC) error in data

You can use the `bzip2recover' program to attempt to recover
data from undamaged sections of corrupted files.

bigblue1> 

bigblue1> bzip2recover paraview.diff.bz2 
bzip2recover 1.0.3: extracts blocks from damaged .bz2 files.
bzip2recover: searching for block boundaries ...
   block 1 runs from 80 to 332048 (incomplete)
bzip2recover: sorry, I couldn't find any block boundaries.
bigblue1>
